# Public sync exclusion list for LedgerLeap
# Keep this file aligned with docs/work/2026-05-23_oss-publication-plan.md §4.3 and §5.3.

.env.testing

# Secret handling:
# - Never publish raw secrets, tokens, credentials, or demo credentials.
# - Public-facing docs must use placeholders such as <generated-token>.
# - Perform secret scans before publishing or syncing new content.
